name: Classic Theater
description: 200 seats, ten raked rows split by a center aisle. Left and right orchestra are separate sections; front rows are VIP.

name: Cinema
description: 180 seats with a slight curve and two side aisles, screen at the front.

name: Stadium Curved
description: About 8,000 seats across four curved tiers around the pitch. One terrace category.

name: Opera Hall
description: Multi-tier opera hall: orchestra, mezzanine, balcony, and side boxes.

name: Circle Hall
description: 300 seats in a five-ring full circle around a central stage.

name: Conference Hall
description: 150 classroom-style seats facing a stage, ten rows of fifteen.

name: Talk Show Studio
description: 80 seats wrapping three-quarters around a central host area.
